# AER Ring-fencing Register (extract)

**Entity:** Eastland Energy Networks Pty Ltd
**Instrument:** AER Ring-fencing Guideline — Electricity Distribution
**Regulated business:** Eastland Power (DNSP — standard control services)
**Unregulated business:** Eastland Connect (contestable)

> ⚠️ **SYNTHETIC COMPOSITE — TEST FIXTURE.** Illustrative ring-fencing position; not a real compliance statement. See `../../REFERENCES_AND_METHODOLOGY.md`.

## Activity classification

| Activity | Classification | Notes |
|----------|----------------|-------|
| Poles, wires, zone substations, control room | Regulated | Standard control service |
| Metering (regulated) | Regulated | — |
| Public EV charging | Unregulated (Eastland Connect) | Contestable |
| Behind-the-meter solar & battery | Unregulated (Eastland Connect) | Contestable |
| Contestable connection works | Unregulated (Eastland Connect) | Contestable |
| Dark-fibre / OT-telco leasing | Unregulated (Eastland Connect) | Spare fibre capacity |

## Separation controls — status

| Control area | Status | Gap |
|--------------|--------|-----|
| Legal/financial separation | In place | Cost-allocation methodology needs strengthening for determination |
| Staff sharing | Partial | Some staff hold roles in both businesses |
| Shared systems (SharePoint, CRM, identity) | Shared tenancy | Information barriers configured **but not enforced to audit standard** |
| Information flow (network data → unregulated arm) | **Risk** | Constraint maps, DOE outputs, connection pipeline commercially valuable to EV/solar arm; policy-only control |
| Branding separation | Inconsistent | "Eastland Power" vs "Eastland Connect" bleed together |
| Waivers | None current | — |

## Cross-link to privacy

Network-collected customer data potentially visible/useful to Eastland Connect = combined **ring-fencing + APP 6 (secondary use)** exposure. See `03_Regulation_Compliance_interview_extracted.md`.
